id: aug24-2
name: Most People Believe X to Achieve Y — Actually You Need Y to Get X
technique: reversal
platforms: [x]
tags: [cliche-reversal, one-liner, inverse, mindset, conventional-wisdom]
source_month: "2024-08"
---

## Why It Works

This X post worked really well because it's a reverse play on a common cliche, which makes this template easy to apply to any cliche. Start by using the cliche of choice and simply turn it to the inverse. Simple, interesting, and effective.

## Template

Most people believe you need to [DoPopularThing] to [AchievePopularGoal].

I believe you need to [AchievePopularGoal] to [DoPopularThing].

## Example

Most people believe you need to succeed to gain confidence.
I believe you need to gain confidence to succeed.
